text: [tool event, count=1, tool=Bash] Exit code 1 GraphQL: Projects (classic) is being deprecated in favor of the new Projects experience, see: https://github.blog/changelog/2024-05-23-sunset-notice-projects-classic/. (repository.issue.projectCards) || command/context: cd ~/projects/one21tools && gh issue view 170 && echo "---ALL OPEN ISSUES---" && gh issue list --limit 100 --state open

Scope came from an issue audit: #170's remaining milestones (M3, templates, README drift) + related #191 items + ADR 0055 stuck at status:proposed. A /decide decision-set ran first (3 advisors incl. opposing counsel, PM wrote ADR 0063, amended 0055); implementation followed the decisions.

Friction 1: the project advisor agents in .claude/agents/ were NOT registered as spawnable agent types this session (session working dir is the parent ~/projects, not the repo) — worked around by spawning general-purpose agents instructed to read and adopt the persona files.

[tool event, count=2, tool=Edit] <tool_use_error>File has not been read yet. Read it first before writing to it.</tool_use_error> || command/context: /home/user/projects/one21tools/skill-bench/scripts/run_eval.py
gh quirks (already in memory/conventions): gh issue view without --json fails on this repo (Projects-classic deprecation).

Friction 4 (defect found riding along): hermetic_driver_test.py had its CarveOut test class defined BELOW the `if __name__ == "__main__": unittest.main()` block, so its 4 tests never ran in CI (19 vs 13 tests now); fixed in the templates commit.

Friction 5: empirical-evals.md went 16 chars over its 12000 reference cap on a pointer edit; resolved by cutting a duplicated attribution comment rather than iterating against the linter.
Friction 3: check-restatement caught a verbatim method-foundations sentence duplicated between skill-bench/README.md and the /bench SKILL.md — the gate worked as designed; fixed by pointing.
Friction 2: a first commit attempt swallowed pre-staged git-mv renames into the ADR commit (git mv stages immediately); caught and re-cut via soft reset before push.
